entries.name: GPT-4 Technical Report — MMLU
entries.note: Metric and value reported. Model identifier is 'GPT-4' without a build pin; dataset version, sample seeds, and pre-registration are absent in the public source.

entries.name: Claude 3 Model Card — GPQA
entries.note: Per-model build is pinned (claude-3-opus-20240229). Dataset is named without a content hash. Threshold direction and pre-registration timestamp are not present.

entries.name: Llama 3 Paper — HumanEval pass@1
entries.note: Pass@1 implies a direction. Model variants (8B / 70B / 405B) are explicit. HumanEval is named; the dataset hash is not committed in the canonical paper.

entries.name: Gemini 1.5 Tech Report — MMLU
entries.note: 'Gemini 1.5 Pro' is named without a checkpoint hash. MMLU is named without a fixed revision. Sample-size detail is paragraph-level prose, not a structured field.

entries.name: DeepSeek-V3 Tech Report — MATH-500
entries.note: Open weights have stable hashes via HF model SHA. Paper reports value with direction. Pre-registration and seeds are not part of the published format.

entries.name: Mistral Large 2 — MMLU
entries.note: Release page names the model build (mistral-large-2407). Eval set is named without revision pin; pre-registration and sample-size structure absent.

entries.name: Phi-3 Technical Report — GSM8K
entries.note: Phi family papers cite seed in some tables. Strong on most fields; pre-registration timestamp is absent (a structural gap, not a Microsoft-specific issue).

entries.name: Qwen2.5 Technical Report — MATH
entries.note: Open weights pin model identity. Sample sizes per benchmark are tabulated. Dataset hash and pre-registration absent.

entries.name: Inflection-2.5 — MMLU
entries.note: Release announcement names the metric and dataset family. No build identifier, no sample structure, no pre-registration anchor in the published source.

entries.name: Grok-2 — MMLU
entries.note: Release blog format. Model name without build pin. No structural eval metadata in the public artifact (a property of release-blog format, not Grok-specific).

entries.name: Yi-Large — MMLU
entries.note: Open weights provide model identity via HF SHA. Sample-size and seed structure absent in the public release notes.

entries.name: Reka Core — MMMU
entries.note: Tech card format. Build pin and structural eval metadata absent.

entries.name: Cohere Command-R+ — RAG eval
entries.note: Build identifier (command-r-plus) is stable. RAG-specific evals are described prose-style; no structured manifest in the canonical source.

entries.name: BigBench-Hard — original release
entries.note: Academic origin: dataset hash is implicit via repo SHA. Seeds tabulated. Pre-registration is the missing field — not because the paper is weak but because PRML didn't exist.

entries.name: HELM Lite — release scoreboard
entries.note: HELM is the closest-to-PRML structure in the wild. Per-model SHA, dataset revisions, seeds, and sample sizes are recorded. Pre-registration timestamp is the gap — addressable via a registry anchor.

entries.name: OpenLLM Leaderboard v2
entries.note: Open weights, fixed eval harness, public commit hashes for both. Pre-registration absent; runs are reactive to model release, not pre-committed.

entries.name: GAIA Benchmark — paper
entries.note: Benchmark paper carries explicit dataset and metric structure. Pre-registration timestamp absent (PRML-shaped gap, common to academic format).

entries.name: AlpacaEval 2.0 — leaderboard
entries.note: Win-rate eval, judge model versioned. Dataset hash and per-run sample sizes not pinned in the public scorecard.

entries.name: MT-Bench — leaderboard
entries.note: Judge-model approach. Seeds and per-run sample structure not part of the leaderboard format.

entries.name: Chatbot Arena — Elo leaderboard
entries.note: Live, reproducible vote stream; sample size visible. Threshold direction n/a for Elo. Pre-registration applies differently to live systems — v0.2 is examining a streaming variant.

entries.name: AISI — pre-deployment eval (2024 batch)
entries.note: Government-grade evaluation, with most structural fields recorded internally. Pre-registration absent because no shared anchor format yet exists — the gap PRML aims to close.

entries.name: Apollo Scheming evals — paper
entries.note: High-rigor adversarial evaluation. Most fields documented. Pre-registration timestamp is absent because the publication date is post-run.

entries.name: METR — Capability Eval batch
entries.note: METR's task-specification format ships closest to a pre-registered structure. The 9/9 here is partially generous: pre-registration is implicit in the task-launch format, not stamped explicitly.

measures: STRUCTURAL DISCLOSURE COMPLETENESS of a published eval claim — whether a third party could re-verify it from the public source. NOT honesty, NOT quality. A low score means under-specified, not wrong.

reference_examples.name: Gradient Pre-Registration Trial — sample run
reference_examples.note: A run anchored against the registry. Included as a calibration row: this is what 9/9 looks like when the format is the artifact.

reference_examples.name: PRML self-eval (this site)
reference_examples.note: The widget itself, when fed a complete PRML manifest, scores 9/9 — by construction. Useful as a structural reference.
